data.title: Applied Materials Hikes Dividend For 8th Year, Greenlights $10 Billion Buyback to Reward Investors
data.description: Applied Materials increases dividend by 15% for 8th consecutive year, authorizes $10B share repurchase. Generated $925M in cash in Q1.

data.title: Rocket Wants $1.75 Billion Redfin Deal To Change How America Buys Homes
data.description: Redfin shareholders will receive 0.7926 shares of Rocket Class A common stock for each Redfin share—a 63% premium.

data.title: DoorDash Stock Is Rising Monday: What's Driving The Action?
data.description: DoorDash Inc (NASDAQ:DASH) shares are trading higher Monday amid the company joining the S&P 500. Here's what you need to know.

data.title: ServiceNow Eyes $3 Billion AI Deal, Targets Boost From Moveworks Chatbot Tech
data.description: ServiceNow Inc (NYSE: NOW) is set to purchase AI firm Moveworks for $3 billion. Moveworks provides AI assistants for companies like Broadcom.

data.title: Cisco, Nvidia, Arista Tackle Tariff Turmoil: Who's Best Positioned?
data.description: JPMorgan analyst weighs in on hardware and networking sector, suggests companies with software-driven hardware and infrastructure focus will weather the storm.
